name: SEMrush Holdings, Inc.
summary: SEMrush Holdings, Inc. is a leading online visibility management SaaS platform enabling companies globally to identify and reach target audiences. Its platform uses data and AI-powered interconnected hubs covering generative engine optimization, SEO, paid advertising, social media management, local marketing, brand marketing, and content marketing. The company serves businesses seeking to improve digital presence across multiple channels through subscription-based software tools.

products.name: SEMrush Platform
products.description: AI-powered online visibility management SaaS platform with hubs for SEO, paid advertising, social media, local marketing, brand marketing, and content marketing.

products.name: Generative Engine Optimization Hub
products.description: Hub focused on generative engine optimization for AI-driven search technologies.

products.name: SEO Hub
products.description: Search engine optimization tools for improving organic search visibility.

products.name: Social Media Management Hub
products.description: Tools for managing and optimizing social media presence and campaigns.

products.name: Local Marketing Hub
products.description: Tools for local marketing visibility and audience targeting.

products.name: Content Marketing Hub
products.description: Tools for content marketing strategy, creation, and optimization.

partnerships.description: Pending acquisition of SEMrush by Adobe Inc., a Delaware corporation, referenced throughout the filing.
